Dwarf.description: Stout folk skilled in mining and metalworking.

Elf.description: Graceful folk with pointed ears and a youthful appearance.

Gnome.description: A small and curious people who tinker with craft of all sorts.

talents.Wizened: Ignore spell effects on you (if you desire) unless caster's cast check was 13+
talents.Tinkerer: Add Mend to known spells (using your choice of I/W/Ch)
talents.Trickster: Add Minor Illusion to known spells (using your choice of I/W/Ch)

Half-Elf.description: Born of a union of elf and human, often masters of diplomacy.

talents.Ambitious: Extra class talent roll at level 1

Halfling.description: A small and cheerful folk who enjoy life's simple pleasures.

talents.Lucky: Start with and can have extra luck token
talents.Sneaky: Hidden with partial cover or concealment; full speed while hidden

Human.description: A bold, adaptable, and diverse people.

talents.Ambitious: Extra class talent roll at level 1
talents.Lucky: Start with and can have extra luck token
talents.Resilient: Gain AD with a second stat save
